name: Treat Spyware and Virus as Offenses
notes: Reports spyware and/or a virus on events. Enable this rule if you wish all events categorized as Virus or Spyware to create an offense.
conditions_text: where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Malware.Spyware Detected, Malware.Virus Detected
TD_list: APPLY Treat Spyware and Virus as Offenses on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Malware.Spyware Detected, Malware.Virus Detected
